items.label: Site description
items.value: Cascade retrofit of lighting-layout uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali example. 80 m² open-plan office (10×8 m); 20 × LED_PANEL_600 at 6000 lm each in 4×5 grid; DALI master control; Part L compliant. Happy-path cascade — all 9 INVs PASS. This is the post-D.2 retrofit version of the standalone C.1 Example 1 (uk-open-plan-office-10x8-dali-photometric); same math, but the consumed_intents source_path points to the real lighting-layout example.

value._source: Synthetic 600x600mm recessed LED panel, 6000lm, 4000K, opal diffuser. Distribution: Lambertian cos(theta) per CIBSE LG7 §6.2 typical opal panel. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3 — generated by scripts/generate_reference_ies.py. Engineer must substitute project IES.
